zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Pigott於1492年8月5日出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，她的父親Thomas Pigott38歲，母親Isabel Gascoigne32歲。她和Sir James Metcalfe至少有6個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1531年2月3日在英國越可爾阿斯可利格享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾阿斯可利格。

meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire) and Irish: variant of   Piggott  .

variants.name: Piggott
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Pickett  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Pigott was born on 5 August 1492, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Pigott, was 38 and her mother, Isabel Gascoigne, was 32. She had at least 6 sons and 6 daughters with Sir James Metcalfe. She died on 3 February 1531, in Askrigg, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in Askrigg, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Pigott est née le 5 août 1492, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Pigott, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Isabel Gascoigne, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles avec Sir James Metcalfe. Elle est décédée le 3 février 1531, à Askrigg, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Askrigg, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hatte mit Sir James Metcalfe mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Februar 1531 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Askrigg, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Askrigg, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Pigottが1492年8月5日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Pigottは38歳，母Isabel Gascoigneは32歳であった。彼女はSir James Metcalfeとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1531年2月3日にイギリスヨークシュアイアアスクリググで38歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアアスクリググにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Pigott(이)가 1492년 8월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Pigott(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Gascoigne(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Sir James Metcalfe(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1531년 2월 3일 영국 요르크실르 아스크리그에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 아스크리그에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Pigott родилась 5 августа 1492 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Pigott было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Gascoigne, 32. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей от Sir James Metcalfe. Она умерла 3 февраля 1531 г. в местности аскриг, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности аскриг, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
